urdu transliteration text:
Mujrae khalq mein in ankhon ne kya kya dekhaPar kahin sibte payambar sa na aqa dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: From amongst these people, O what did these eyes see? But never a Master like the Prophet’s grandson did they see.

urdu transliteration text:
Meine Dekha Alame Shah Ko Aluda Ba-khoonMeine Abbas Ko Bejan Labe Darya Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I saw that my Lord’s banner splattered with blood. By the banks of the flowing river, the lifeless body of Abbas I saw

urdu transliteration text:
Meine Dekha Ali Asghar Ka Gala Khoon Me TarMeine Zakhmi Ali Akbar Ka Kaleja Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I saw the neck of Ali Asghar, moistened by its own blood. Mortally wounded, the heart of Ali Akbar I saw

urdu transliteration text:
Aik Ghatri Shah-e-deen Phusht Pe Laaye Usme, Mai Ne Tukdre Huwe Qasim Ka Saraapa Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: There was a bundle that the King of the Faith (Imam) carried upon his back; and in it. I saw the body of Qasim, from head to toe, in chopped pieces

urdu transliteration text:
Ghir Pare Sibte Nabi Thaam Ke Haathon Se Jigaar, Ali Akbar Ko Jo Reti Pe Tardpta Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The grandson of the Prophet fell upon the ground, with his hands clasping his heartwhen he saw Ali Akbar, writhing on the sands

urdu transliteration text:
Kehti Thi Zainab-e-muztar Kay Khuda Khair KareRaat Ko Khwaab Mein Uriyan Sar-e-zahra Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Said the woeful Zainab by God, may all be well. Last night, in my dreams, Zahra without her veil I saw

urdu transliteration text:
Jaake Zainab Ne Madine Mei Kaha Sughra SeKaho Kiss Muse Ke Pardes Mei Kya Kya Dekha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Said Zainab unto Sughra upon her return to Madina. How can I possibly narrate in the Foreign Land (Karbala) What we saw
